# Rosetta Brands

> The UK's only Vendor-as-a-Service (VaaS) for FMCG brands on Amazon. Rosetta Brands is a Top 15 Grocery Vendor on Amazon UK, managing 958+ brands and generating £100M+ in revenue for clients. FMCG brands trade through Rosetta Brands' own vendor account rather than building and managing their own Amazon Vendor or Seller Central relationship.

Rosetta Brands operates three service pillars: Vendor-as-a-Service (account infrastructure, fulfilment, compliance), Growth Marketing (advertising, content, product launches), and Platform (proprietary technology for order automation, listing health, reporting). The business specialises in ambient grocery and is now unlocking Amazon Fresh for UK brands. Headquartered in Lancashire, UK, with operations across Australia and Germany.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://rosettabrands.com/): Overview of the Vendor-as-a-Service model, core statistics, and service pillars
- [Why Rosetta Brands](https://rosettabrands.com/why-rosetta-brands): The five reasons FMCG brands choose Rosetta over an agency, consultancy, or running Seller Central themselves
- [Meet the Team](https://rosettabrands.com/meet-the-team): Company history and bios for Nick Comer (CEO), Sophie Smith (Commercial Director), Matt Nash (Head of Sales), Becky Webster (Head of Vendor)
- [Pricing](https://rosettabrands.com/pricing): Success-fee based pricing structure tied to client growth
- [Schedule a Call](https://rosettabrands.com/schedule-a-call): Book a discovery call with the commercial team
- [Careers](https://rosettabrands.com/careers): Open roles and how to join the team

## Solutions by situation

- [Amazon Vendors](https://rosettabrands.com/amazon-vendors): For brands currently running their own Vendor Central account
- [Amazon Sellers](https://rosettabrands.com/amazon-sellers): For brands currently on Seller Central considering the vendor route
- [New to Amazon](https://rosettabrands.com/new-to-amazon): For FMCG brands entering the channel for the first time
- [Amazon Agencies](https://rosettabrands.com/amazon-agencies): For agencies wanting vendor infrastructure to offer their clients

## FMCG categories

- [Grocery & Gourmet](https://rosettabrands.com/grocery-gourmet): Ambient grocery specialisation, Top 15 Grocery Vendor credential, Amazon Fresh access
- [Beer, Wine & Spirits](https://rosettabrands.com/beer-wine-spirits): Alcohol category compliance and listing strategy
- [Health & Personal Care](https://rosettabrands.com/health-personal-care): Regulated category approach
- [Pet Supplies](https://rosettabrands.com/pet-supplies): Pet food and supplies on Amazon
- [Home & Household](https://rosettabrands.com/home-household): FMCG home and cleaning products
- [Garden & Outdoor](https://rosettabrands.com/garden-outdoor): Seasonal garden and outdoor goods

## Vendor-as-a-Service

- [Vendor Access & Prime](https://rosettabrands.com/vendor-access): How the vendor account works, Prime badge from day one
- [Vendor Management Team](https://rosettabrands.com/vendor-management-team): The dedicated team managing each brand partnership
- [Compliance & Escalation](https://rosettabrands.com/compliance-escalation): Chargeback, compliance, and escalation handling
- [International Expansion](https://rosettabrands.com/international-expansion): Route into Amazon DE, IE, and wider EU marketplaces
- [Exclusive Amazon Programmes](https://rosettabrands.com/exclusive-amazon-programmes): Access to Amazon programmes available only to established vendors
- [Fulfilment & Logistics](https://rosettabrands.com/fulfilment): Amazon Freight lanes, pallet-level inbound, logistics

## Growth Marketing

- [Advertising](https://rosettabrands.com/advertising): Amazon Ads strategy and execution
- [Brand Store](https://rosettabrands.com/brand-store): Branded destination page design and build
- [A+ Content](https://rosettabrands.com/aplus-content): Enhanced product detail page content
- [Key Feature Images & Lifestyle](https://rosettabrands.com/key-feature-images): Product image and lifestyle photography
- [Product Launch](https://rosettabrands.com/product-launch): New SKU and product launch playbook

## Platform (proprietary technology)

- [Order Automation](https://rosettabrands.com/order-automation): Automated order processing across vendor accounts
- [Client Portal](https://rosettabrands.com/client-portal): Self-service visibility for brand partners
- [Listing Health & Optimisation](https://rosettabrands.com/listing-health): Continuous listing quality monitoring
- [Reporting & Analytics](https://rosettabrands.com/reporting-analytics): Category and brand performance reporting

## Resources

- [FAQ](https://rosettabrands.com/faqs): 25 strategic questions covering the VaaS model, vendor position, pricing, and results
- [Case Studies](https://rosettabrands.com/case-studies): Anonymised brand stories from 8 real partnerships
- [Blog](https://rosettabrands.com/blog): Insights and analysis from the Rosetta Brands team
- [Blog - Amazon Chargebacks](https://rosettabrands.com/amazon-chargebacks): What vendor chargebacks are, how they erode margins, and how FMCG brands can reduce exposure
- [Blog - Subscribe and Save](https://rosettabrands.com/subscribe-and-save): How FMCG brands can use Amazon's Subscribe and Save programme to drive repeat purchase and LTV
- [Blog - Brand Pricing on Amazon](https://rosettabrands.com/brand-pricing-amazon): How FMCG vendors can protect brand pricing when Amazon controls the retail price in Vendor Central
- [Blog - Selling Alcohol on Amazon UK](https://rosettabrands.com/selling-alcohol-amazon-uk): Practical guide to age-gating, DRS compliance, and category restrictions for drinks brands on Amazon UK
- [Blog - TACoS vs ACoS](https://rosettabrands.com/tacos-vs-acos): Why TACoS is the better north star metric for FMCG brands advertising on Amazon, and how to calculate it
- [Blog - Seller Central to Vendor Central](https://rosettabrands.com/seller-central-to-vendor-central): What the commercial and operational transition from 3P Seller Central to 1P Vendor Central actually involves
- [Blog - Why Vendor Central Access Has Closed](https://rosettabrands.com/vendor-central-access): Why Amazon stopped issuing new Vendor Central invitations and what UK FMCG brands can do to access 1P status in 2025 and beyond

- [Privacy Policy](https://rosettabrands.com/privacy): Data collection, legal basis, rights, and cookie policy
